name: flow-04-waitlist-manager
description: T64 WaitlistManager — PROCESSING archetype. FIFO by joinTimestamp. Position computed on dequeue not enqueue.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: fifo-by-timestamp, position-computed-on-dequeue, not-at-enqueue
Retrieve PROCESSING arch pattern for T64: FIFO waitlist, dequeue-time position computation
Break T64 into: join waitlist (store with joinTimestamp) → on capacity release: ORDER BY joinTimestamp → pick first → assign seat
Generate waitlist-manager.service.ts — FIFO by joinTimestamp. Position computed on dequeue not enqueue.
Score generated code 0-100 against T64 iron rules: FIFO ordering, dequeue-time position, no stored position field
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
